subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my Beloved, my Goal, the Ultimate End of my hope and expectation! I beseech Thee by the Name through which the ocean surged [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا الهی و محبوبی و مقصودی و غایه املی و رجائی اسئلک بالاسم الذی به ماج بحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
